title: The Han Solo Adventures (omnibus)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the novel by [[Brian Daley]]|[[The Han Solo Trilogy (hardcover)|''The Han Solo Trilogy'' hardcover]], by [[A. C. Crispin]]}} {{Book |image=[[File:The_Han_Solo_Adventures_1992.jpg]] |title=''The Han Solo Adventures'' |author=[[Brian Daley]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Del Rey]] |early release= |release date=[[April 22]], [[1992]]{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/36340/the-han-solo-adventures-star-wars-legends-by-brian-daley/9780345379801|text=The Han Solo Adventures: Star Wars Legends}} {{C|Paperback}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=*Paperback *eBook |pages=576 |isbn=9780345379801 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]–[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |series=''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''The Han Solo Adventures''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] novel by [[Brian Daley]]. It collects all three volumes of the ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]'' series: ''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' ([[1979]]), ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' (1979), and ''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' ([[1980]]). The compendium was first published on [[April 22]], [[1992]] by [[Del Rey]]. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Han Solo Adventures}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9780345379801}}; [[April 22]], [[1992]]; [[Del Rey]]; US paperback *{{ISBN|9780307795489}}; [[June 28]], [[2011]]; Del Rey; US eBook{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/36340/the-han-solo-adventures-star-wars-legends-by-brian-daley/9780307795489|text=The Han Solo Adventures: Star Wars Legends}} {{C|eBook}} *{{ISBN|9780593726129}}; [[November 5]], [[2024]]; [[Random House Worlds]]; [[The Essential Legends Collection]] Paperback{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/36340/the-han-solo-adventures-star-wars-legends-by-brian-daley/9780593726129|text=The Han Solo Adventures: Star Wars Legends}} {{C|Paperback}} ===Cover gallery=== {{ScrollBox|content= File:The_Han_Solo_Adventures_1992.jpg|US paperback File:Novelsoloadv.jpg|US paperback, 1994 reprint File:The_Han_Solo_Adventures_2002.jpg|US paperback, 2002 reprint File:HanSoloAdventures-Legends.png|US paperback, Legends reprint File:HanSoloAdventures_DeRe.jpg|German-language edition, reprint File:The_Han_Solo_Adventures_Hungarian_Cover.jpg|Hungarian-language edition File:HanSoloAdventures_PL.jpg|Polish-language edition FIle:Han Solo Adventures Essential Legends Cover.jpg|[[The Essential Legends Collection]] cover File:HanSoloAdventures_De.gif|German-language edition }} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|150|Launchpad|Launch Pad}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/36340/the-han-solo-adventures-star-wars-legends-by-brian-daley/9780345379801|text=The Han Solo Adventures: Star Wars Legends}} {{Trilogy-box |title=''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]''
